0000123456 2024-01-01 2024-12-31 0000123456 2024-12-31 2024 FY 2024-12-31 4,250

Item 1. Business

Example Foods sells packaged tomato products and soup in North America.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

We face commodity exposure to tomatoes, steel cans, and foreign currency including Swiss franc denominated costs.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Management discusses liquidity, debt maturities, impairment charges, and dividend policy.

Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

We use options and forward contracts. Certain hedging relationships are not designated as accounting hedges.

Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data

The consolidated statements include notes about derivatives and impairment.

Item 9A. Controls and Procedures

Disclosure controls and procedures were effective.
